news-korea-econ.title: U.N. Atomic Body: 'Very Serious Increase' in North Korea Nuclear Weapons Production
news-korea-econ.description:
The head of the United Nations nuclear body, the International Atomic Energy Agency (IAEA), warned on Wednesday that he had reason to believe communist North Korea had engaged in a "very serious increase" in activity to make nuclear weapons.

news-global-econ.title: Chinese National Sentenced to One Year in Prison for Smuggling Ants from Kenya
news-global-econ.description:
A court in Nairobi on Wednesday sentenced a Chinese national named Zhang Kequn to a year in prison, plus a fine of one million shillings ($7,737), for trying to smuggle live ants out of Kenya.

news-global-econ.title: Exclusive: Sen. Tom Cotton on His Bill to Block Pharmaceuticals Made by CCP-Affiliated Companies
news-global-econ.description:
Sen. Tom Cotton introduced a bill to ensure that companies that produce drugs for Americans do not have ties to the Chinese Communist Party.

news-global-econ.title: Kamala Harris Complains About Gas Prices Despite Overseeing Highest on Record as Vice President
news-global-econ.description:
Failed Democrat presidential candidate Kamala Harris complained about gas prices this week despite overseeing the highest record ever as sitting vice president in the summer of 2022.

news-global-econ.title: American travelers warned about popular low-cost beach destination as global tensions rise
news-global-econ.description: U.S. officials have issued a travel advisory for Tirana, Albania, urging American tourists to exercise increased vigilance amid ongoing Iran-related tensions.

news-global-econ.title: Apple and Google Continue to Offer 'Nudify' Apps that Use AI to Generate Deepfake Porn
news-global-econ.description:
Apple and Google are continuing to offer "nudify" apps that allow users to create AI-generated deepfake pornography of real people, despite both companies maintaining policies that explicitly prohibit such content, according to a new report.

news-global-soc.title: FIFA fires back at New Jersey Gov Mikie Sherill over demand to pay for World Cup transit tickets
news-global-soc.description: FIFA pushed back on NJ Gov. Mikie Sherill's call for FIFA to pay for fan transit to World Cup 2026 matches at MetLife Stadium, citing host agreements.

news-global-soc.title: NOT BLUFFING: Stephen Miller says Trump is directly involved, 'holds all of the cards' in Iran negotiations
news-global-soc.description: Stephen Miller says Trump is directly involved in Iran negotiations, calling the U.S. blockade a move "resetting the entire global order."
